subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Today, verily, those handmaids who are mentioned in the Abhá Kingdom have raised the pavilion of ancient glory to the heights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله الیوم اماای در ملکوت ابهی مذکورند که سرادق عزت قدیمه را بر اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @high station of the true believer
